name: Highly Volatile Markets
description: Prediction markets with the most price movement — markets where odds are actively shifting, signaling new information or contested outcomes. Sorted by absolute 24-hour price change, filtered for sufficient liquidity, and with diversity enforcement so you don't get 10 variants of the same Bitcoin target price.
customization_hints: Switch sort_by to 'one_week_price_change_abs' to catch slower-moving but significant shifts
Lower liquidity_num threshold (e.g. 10000) to include smaller but still-active markets
Remove price_under05_or_over95 exclusion if you want to include long-shot markets that are spiking
Decrease diversity lambda toward 0.2 for maximum topic spread, or increase toward 0.7 to cluster similar volatile markets
Add a numeric filter on 'span_days' >= 7 to exclude short-lived micro-markets
